title: Sharing a custom board view
excerpt:
Hi there, 
We have recently built a Mindmapping View for Monday boards. 
But the share option is disabled for this view. 
Is there a way to create a shareable link for this view using the API? 
Thanks.

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

We have recently built a Mindmapping View for Monday boards.

But the share option is disabled for this view.
Is there a way to create a shareable link for this view using the API?

Thanks.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kranthi_thoughtflow,

At this time, I’m afraid that you can’t currently broadcast (i.e. create a shareable link) for your custom board views just yet.

However, I would be more than happy to forward your feedback along! I can see how useful this would be, and hope this gets built out soon.

-Helen
